cause_analysis.narrative: Alexandria Kiema LMP, LA -- Kiema Massage churned on 2026-02-09 after 210 days with Zoca. Sentiment turned negative on 2026-02-09 (app_chat) — first complaint keyword: "issue". Classification: service complaint. Negative signals appeared but no explicit cancellation request.
recommendations: [Escalation] First negative sentiment on 2026-02-09 via app_chat. Triggering a same-day AM touchpoint on any negative keyword would have caught this.
[Sentiment] Add an automated sentiment alerting layer over app_chat/email that pages the AM when negative keywords appear.
